query: Do a code review on my latest changes before I commit.
Review my changes for CLAUDE.md compliance and type safety.
Check the imports and organization in the issue_lifecycle.ts refactor.
General review of this diff — is DDD respected? Tests present?
Review my code before I open the PR.
Try to break my code — assume it's broken until proven otherwise.
Audit this credential-handling code for injection risks.
Review the CLI output formatting and help text of the new command.
Review my new SKILL.md for trigger precision and context budget.
Write a failing test first for this retry fix.
Triage issue #99 and plan the implementation.
